name: openssl
description: Cryptography toolkit implementing SSL/TLS protocols and general purpose cryptography

options.name: -strparse
options.description: Parse the content octets of the ASN.1 object starting at offset

options.name: -genstr
options.description: String to generate ASN1 structure from

options.name: -genconf
options.description: File to generate ASN1 structure from

options.name: -strictpem
options.description: Do not attempt base64 decode outside PEM markers

options.name: -dlimit
options.description: Dump the first arg bytes of unknown data

options.name: -infiles
options.description: The last argument, requests to process

options.name: -out
options.description: Where to put the output file(s)

options.name: -notext
options.description: Do not print the generated certificate

options.name: -msie_hack
options.description: MSIE modifications to handle all Universal Strings

options.name: -ss_cert
options.description: File contains a self signed cert to sign

options.name: -spkac
options.description: File contains DN and signed public key and challenge

options.name: -engine
options.description: Use engine, possibly a hardware device

options.name: -name
options.description: The particular CA definition to use

options.name: -subj
options.description: Use arg instead of request's subject

options.name: -utf8
options.description: Input characters are UTF8; default ASCII

options.name: -create_serial
options.description: If reading serial fails, create a new random serial

options.name: -rand_serial
options.description: Always create a random serial; do not store it

options.name: -days
options.description: Number of days to certify the cert for

options.name: -extensions
options.description: Extension section (override value in config file)

options.name: -extfile
options.description: Configuration file with X509v3 extensions to add

options.name: -noemailDN
options.description: Don't add the EMAIL field to the DN

options.name: -md
options.description: Digest to use, such as sha256

options.name: -passin
options.description: Key and cert input file pass phrase source

options.name: -key
options.description: Key to decrypt the private key or cert files if encrypted

options.name: -selfsign
options.description: Sign a cert with the key associated with it

options.name: -valid
options.description: Add a Valid(not-revoked) DB entry about a cert

options.name: -status
options.description: Shows cert status given the serial number

options.name: -crl_hold
options.description: The hold instruction OID; sets reason to certificateHold

options.name: -crl_compromise
options.description: Sets compromise time and reason to keyCompromise

options.name: -crl_CA_compromise
options.description: Sets compromise time and reason to CACompromise

options.name: -crldays
options.description: Days until the next CRL is due

options.name: -crlhours
options.description: Hours until the next CRL is due

options.name: -crlsec
options.description: Seconds until the next CRL is due

options.description: Load the given file(s) into the random number generator

options.name: -writerand
options.description: Write random data to the specified file

options.name: -provider
options.description: Provider to load (can be specified multiple times)

options.name: -propquery
options.description: Property query used when fetching algorithms
